title: arctostaphylos nevadensis subsp. knightii
intro: Arctostaphylos nevadensis subsp. knightii, also known as Knight's Manzanita, is a subspecies of the Manzanita plant, a type of evergreen shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Knight's Manzanita include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
